reasoning: The base rate for generic financial market variables implies near-random walk behavior in the short term, but recently there has been a positive trend in Baa yields (+0.005 per day over the last 30 periods, according to the FRED API analysis). Moreover, the value on Nov 21 (5.88) is at the bottom of the recent 7-day trading range (5.88 to 5.92). Given mean reversion to the recent weekly average of ~5.90, the probability of the yield being strictly greater than 5.88 by Nov 30 is elevated. As the forecast horizon extends to December and then February, uncertainty increases, and predictions should gradually revert toward the agnostic 0.50 baseline. Therefore, the probabilities are set to monotonically decrease toward 0.50 as the timeline extends.
